/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/device.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/devices/head_feeder.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/devices/worker_conv1.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/devices/tail_classifier.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/nn/conv1d.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/nn/pooling.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/nn/fully_connected.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/nn/activations.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/nn/optimizers.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/comm/ipc_tensor.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/data/ucr_loader.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/data/tensor.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/config/config_loader.c.o CMakeFiles/device.dir/src/utils/logging.c.o -o device  -lpthread -lm
